description_long: This object is a compact, futuristic-looking shotgun with a bullpup configuration, featuring a matte dark gray and black finish. The upper section houses a transparent, amber-tinted magazine that runs parallel to the barrel, allowing visible observation of the ammunition. The body is constructed with smooth, contoured surfaces and integrated ergonomic grips, including a large trigger guard and thumbhole stock for improved handling. The top of the weapon features a raised sight rail and a prominent charging handle, while the front end is short and squared, with a small muzzle protruding. The overall design is streamlined, with minimal external attachments and a robust, tactical appearance. The materials suggest a combination of metal and high-strength polymer, typical for modern urban firearms.
description: A compact, bullpup-style shotgun with a dark matte finish, transparent magazine, and ergonomic grips. It features a streamlined, tactical design with visible metal and polymer components.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length, transparent magazine, ergonomic grip, and the overall bullpup configuration.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the short, squared muzzle, sight rail, and the compact width of the weapon.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the magazine, charging handle, and the contoured stock design.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the magazine feed, sight rail, and the thumbhole stock opening.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, short and compact with no visible ribbing or venting
attribute_trigger_guard_design: large, rounded, and elongated trigger guard integrated with the grip and thumbhole stock
